title: tithymalus × paradoxus
intro: Tithymalus × paradoxus, also known as Euphorbia × paradoxa, is a hybrid plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) and is a cross between Euphorbia nicaeensis and Euphorbia retusa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tithymalus × paradoxus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of various ailments, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
